Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Deft John F. Henning Iii For Failure To Obey Order Compelling Attendance And At Oral Deposition Of John F. Henning Iii And Imposing Monetary Sanction On John F. Henning Iii; Memo Of P&A Filed In Support; Declaration Of Alex F. Pevzner Filed In Support; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Apr-11-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion for terminating sanctions is granted. Defendant has repeatedly evaded attempts by plaintiff to take his deposition and has failed to comply with prior court orders. The Court notes that Defendant was present in court on September 10, 2004 and requested that the date and time of his deposition be set for October 26, 2004 at 10:00 a.m. Thereafter, on September 13, 2004 Defendant was served with a notice of deposition for said date. In addition, the defendant requested that the Court extend the time to pay the monetary sanctions until October 26, 2004. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
